top_signals.title: War’s over, but ocean rates face raft of challenges
top_signals.summary:
Iran is likely to assert newfound control over the gateway to the Persian Gulf and its crude oil stockpiles.

The post War’s over, but ocean rates face raft of challenges  appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Zelenskyy may have the last laugh over Trump
top_signals.summary: Ukraine’s president increasingly looks as if he holds the future of the west in his hands
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gulf oil tanker rates nearly double as Middle East producers ramp up exports - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Gulf oil tanker rates nearly double as Middle East producers ramp up exports  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Porsche Looks to Reduce Complexity by Cutting Models
top_signals.summary: Porsche AG confirmed its profit outlook for the year as it pushes to become leaner to revive margins battered by US tariffs and weak demand in China. David Welch has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Brexit 10 years later: How the UK economy and politics changed, in charts
top_signals.summary: Ten years after the Brexit vote, CNBC compiled these charts show how the U.K. has changed across growth, immigration, sterling, trade and politics.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Chainlink joins European and Korean bank consortia to develop FX settlement network
top_signals.summary: Banks across Europe and South Korea will study whether regulated euro and won stablecoins can enable real-time cross-border foreign exchange settlement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Blockchain data startup Allium raises $40M Series B as institutional interest in onchain analytics grow
top_signals.summary: Allium raised a $40 million Series B to expand blockchain data infrastructure for institutional clients, including Visa and the Fed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan top court upholds order to dissolve Unification Church
top_signals.summary: This is the first time the top court has finalized a dissolution order for a religious corporation over unlawful acts under the Civil Code.
